title: Shinji Music Episode 9 What music when SDAT Rewind

[]: Shinji Music [Episode 9] What music when SDAT Rewind ?             Quote Post by squarealex » Wed Jul 06, 2016 4:32 pm Hi guys. First, nice community and website. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V1DkUkm ... e=youtu.be I wonder what music Shinji listen when he try to kiss Asuka and his SDAT Rewinds back ? Sorry for poor quality. And sorry if the thread has already done, but I found nothing for that.

[]: Re: Shinji Music [Episode 9] What music when SDAT Rewind ?             Quote Post by JoshuaO » Fri Aug 19, 2016 8:47 am Hiya, After some sleuthing(I fiddled with some audio effects and could make out "Walter and John" which led to this album), it's these 2 songs: Ben Watt with Robert Wyatt - Walter And John Ben Watt & Robert Wyatt - Slipping Slowly
